tracks.rawText: 3:00Vestido Negro, Despaciov5.52016 Mexico nightclub reggaeton pop at 92 BPM: clean dembow kick-snare, bright handclaps, warm electric bass, tropical acoustic guitar riffs, glossy Latin pop synth pads, and smooth male lead vocals with stacked chorus harmonies, Polished radio mix, sensual but clean, catchy looped hook, antro nostalgia, dancefloor-ready and instantly singablePublishRemix
tracks.title: Vestido Negro, Despacio

tracks.rawText: 3:10Candela en la Pistav5.5Reggaeton urbano with dembow-locked percussion, syncopated bass and crisp handclaps; verse stays tight and percussive, pre-chorus strips to kick and filtered chant, chorus opens with a bold singalong hook and gang doubles, Lead vocal is confident and forward, with ad-lib throws, stacked echoes on the hook, and quick risers into every drop, Bright, punchy mix with club-ready low end and sharp top-end sparklePublishRemix
tracks.title: Candela en la Pista
